dsl_rule.translation_notes: MACD histogram above zero confirms uptrend for long entry. Exit when histogram crosses below zero (reversal signal). Used macd_hist indicator which is available in the allowed list. Target regime set to TRENDING_UP as specified in signal. AUTHOR_SILENT exit condition interpreted as histogram reversal (crossing below zero).

backtest_rule.reason: MACD histogram above zero confirms uptrend for long entry. Exit when histogram crosses below zero (reversal signal). Used macd_hist indicator which is available in the allowed list. Target regime set to TRENDING_UP as specified in signal. AUTHOR_SILENT exit condition interpreted as histogram reversal (crossing below zero).

source_rule_text: When the MACD histogram is above zero, it confirms an uptrend.
